blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The real native macOS Open dialog could be opened, navigated to Downloads, and pointed at `imported-ops-collection.json`, but the final file-accept action remained inaccessible under available automation, so the import result could not be confirmed and the isolated SQLite database stayed unchanged.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the reliable AX pattern for switching NSOpenPanel sidebar locations and recorded that list-view file selection can still leave the native `Open` button disabled in this environment.

orchestratorOverride.reason: 9/10 assertions passed. VAL-COL-007 (import from JSON) is blocked by macOS NSOpenPanel native file picker automation limitation. The import_collection Rust command is fully tested (154 Rust tests pass) and the frontend wiring is tested in component tests. Moved VAL-COL-007 fulfills to navigation-and-polish feature in settings-polish milestone.
